name: Starlight Cupcakes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup shortening (half margarine or butter, if desired), softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat all ingredients on low speed for 30 seconds, scraping the sides of the bowl constantly.
3. Increase the speed to high and continue beating until well combined, about 3 minutes.
4. Fill paper-lined medium muffin cups about halfway with batter.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
